title: eriogonum douglasii var. tenue
intro: Eriogonum douglasii var. tenue, also known as the narrow-leaf buckwheat or narrow-leaved buckwheat, is a perennial shrub native to the Pacific coastal region of North America. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, and has been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Eriogonum douglasii var. tenue include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as promoting wound healing and immune system function. The plant can be prepared for medicinal use through herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the leaves and stems in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
